mapper.sql: SELECT p.plan_id, p.contract_id, p.order_id, p.customer_id, p.period_no, p.plan_amount, p.plan_date, p.actual_amount, p.actual_date, p.payment_status, p.payment_method, p.bank_account, p.receipt_attachment, p.overdue_flag, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, p.remark, c.customer_name, ct.contract_no FROM mk_payment_plan p LEFT JOIN mk_customer c ON p.customer_id = c.customer_id LEFT JOIN mk_contract ct ON p.contract_id = ct.contract_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mk_payment_plan (contract_id, order_id, customer_id, period_no, plan_amount, plan_date, actual_amount, actual_date, payment_status, payment_method, bank_account, receipt_attachment, overdue_flag, create_by, create_time, remark) VALUES (#{contractId}, #{orderId}, #{customerId}, #{periodNo}, #{planAmount}, #{planDate}, #{actualAmount}, #{actualDate}, #{paymentStatus}, #{paymentMethod}, #{bankAccount}, #{receiptAttachment}, #{overdueFlag}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM mk_payment_plan WHERE plan_id IN #{planId}
mapper.select: WHERE p.contract_id = #{contractId} ORDER BY p.period_no ASC

WHERE p.plan_date < CURDATE() AND p.payment_status IN ('0', '3') AND p.overdue_flag = '0' AND (p.contract_id IS NULL OR (ct.del_flag = '0' AND ct.contract_status IN ('2', '3', '4'))) ORDER BY p.plan_date ASC
